createdDateTime.description: Date and time the record was created. (Timezone: UTC)

destinationAccountID.description: Id of the bank account to send the refund from.

glAccountID.description: Id of the general ledger account associated with the refund.

lastModifiedBy.description: User who last modified the record.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: Date and time the record was last modified. (Timezone: UTC)

leaseID.description: Id of the lease associated with the refund.

portfolioID.description: Id of the portfolio associated with the refund.

toBePrinted.description: Indicates if the check is to be printed.
